invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.099（基于ATR 0.0019和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.099 (based on ATR 0.0019 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2150.0（基于ATR 41.5和支撑位）或融资费率Z-score降至正常水平（例如低于50%），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2150.0 (based on ATR 41.5 and support) or funding rate Z-score drops to normal levels (e.g., below 50%).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破94.0（基于ATR 1.553和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过-0.005%（空头平仓动力减弱），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 94.0 (based on ATR 1.553 and support) or funding rate turns positive above -0.005% (short covering momentum weakens).
